intended_use: The Incisive CT is a Computed Tomography X-Ray System intended to produce images of the head and body by computer reconstruction of x-ray transmission data taken at different angles and planes. The In
intended_use_full: The Incisive CT is a Computed Tomography X-Ray System intended to produce images of the head and body by computer reconstruction of x-ray transmission data taken at different angles and planes. The Incisive CT is indicated for head, whole body, cardiac and vascular X-ray Computed Tomography applications in patients of all ages. These scanners are intended to be used for diagnostic imaging and for low dose CT lung cancer screening for the early detection of lung nodules that may represent cancer.
target_condition: Head, body, cardiac, and vascular pathology; lung nodules for cancer screening
other_metrics: Image spatial resolution: High resolution mode 16 lp/cm, Standard resolution mode 13 lp/cm; Image noise: 0.27% at 120 kV, 230 mAs, 10 mm slice thickness; Slice thicknesses: Helical 0.67-5mm, Axial 0.625-10.0mm; Scan field of view: up to 500mm; Image matrix: up to 1024×1024; Display resolution: 1920×1080
